reviews.comment:
muy buena atención de las chicas de la playa, el café muy rico y los baños siempre limpios muy atenta la señora de limpieza

(Translated by Google)
The beach staff were very attentive, the coffee was delicious, the bathrooms were always clean, and the cleaning lady was very helpful.

reviews.comment:
Me olvidé la billetera en el baño y al ratito ya se contactó conmigo cynthia la encargada para avisarme que la habían encontrado y me la guardaban. Unos genios

(Translated by Google)
I forgot my wallet in the bathroom, and a little while later Cynthia, the manager, contacted me to let me know they'd found it and were keeping it for me. They're amazing!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7368196998032183080/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNybWM3aEZREAE

reviews.comment:
Hay poco personal atendiendo la cafetería los sábados por la mañana,el sábado pasado había solo dos.
Los tostados de jamón y queso muy cocinados a punto de estar quemados ,sinceramente estaban para devolver pero no quise hacer problema,después el café estaba bien.
Dentro de todo las chicas son bastante veloces pero se nota que están muy exigidas ,le ponen onda pero deben llegar muy cansadas a sus casas.
Espero cambie esa situación.

(Translated by Google)
There are few staff serving the cafeteria on Saturday mornings; last Saturday there were only two.
The ham and cheese toasties were overcooked and almost burnt. Honestly, they were ready to be sent back, but I didn't want to make a fuss about it. The coffee was fine afterward.
Overall, the girls are pretty fast, but you can tell they're really busy. They're really into it, but they must be very tired when they get home.
I hope that situation changes.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7368196998032183080/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNydVBMUEZ3EAE
